Shield Team","custom:security-contact":"security@quantumshield.io","custom:version":"0.1.0","details":"IMPL-009: Implements batch proof verification for gas efficiency  ## Overview This contract provides batch verification of STARK proofs, optimizing gas costs by sharing Merkle path computations across multiple proofs.  ## Gas Optimization Strategy 1. **Shared Merkle Paths**: Proofs sharing ancestors reuse hash computations 2. **Batch Processing**: Amortize fixed costs across multiple proofs 3. **Early Exit**: Skip invalid proofs quickly  ## Target Performance - 10-proof batch: \u226540% gas reduction vs individual verification - 20-proof batch: \u226550% gas reduction vs individual verification  ## CP-1 Compliance (Quantum Resistance) - Uses ONLY SHA3-256 (FIPS 202) for all hash operations - keccak256 is PROHIBITED - 128-bit security level maintained ","kind":"dev","methods":{"constructor":{"params":{"_sharedMerkle":"Address of SharedMerkle
